description:
## What to build

Implement the first issue explorer slice from `docs/research/design/mockups/issue_explorer_functional_sidebar.png` as two independently landable tasks: backend first, frontend second.

The slice should list real Beadwork issues from the current workspace using `bw list --all --json`, expose a narrowed `IssueSummary` command contract, and then render the mockup-aligned issue explorer shell from that contract.

Only listing all issues is in scope. Search, sidebar filters, workspace switching, issue selection, and issue detail behavior remain out of scope except for visual or empty-state scaffolding in the frontend task.

## Child tasks

1. `bsm-8ul` - Expose all issues through a Tauri IssueSummary command.
2. `bsm-tes` - Render the issue explorer shell from IssueSummary data.

## Dependency order

```mermaid
graph LR
    bsm-8ul[Backend IssueSummary command] --> bsm-tes[Frontend issue explorer shell]
```

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Backend command task lands first and defines the command contract.
- [ ] Frontend shell task consumes the backend contract instead of inventing one.
- [ ] The final slice lists all real Beadwork issues across stored statuses.

## Triage

ready-for-agent
title: Epic: List all issues in the issue explorer
